sections.heading: When to use
sections.content_markdown: Use when a bounded change needs an explicit workflow.

sections.heading: When not to use
sections.content_markdown: Do not use when the task is not a bounded change.

sections.heading: Contracts
sections.content_markdown:
- keep scope bounded
- make verification explicit

sections.heading: Risks
sections.content_markdown:
### Failure modes

- silent scope drift

### Negative effects

- extra work

### Misuse patterns

- ritualized planning

### Detection signals

- weak verification

### Mitigations

- re-bound the task

sections.heading: Adaptation notes
sections.content_markdown: Adapt the workflow to local repo conventions.

sections.heading: Future evolution
sections.content_markdown: Future work may refine verification patterns.

sections.heading: When to use
sections.content_markdown: Use when a bounded repository scan is needed.

sections.heading: When not to use
sections.content_markdown: Do not use when the task already names the exact source file.

sections.heading: Core procedure
sections.content_markdown:
1. inspect entrypoints
2. map the next source file

sections.heading: Risks
sections.content_markdown:
### Failure modes

- scan grows too wide

### Negative effects

- time loss

### Misuse patterns

- pretending the scan is understanding

### Detection signals

- too many files opened

### Mitigations

- stop at the next bounded source

sections.heading: Adaptation notes
sections.content_markdown: Adapt to the repo's entrypoint layout.

sections.heading: Checks
sections.content_markdown: Check that the scan points to one next file.

sections.heading: Future evolution
sections.content_markdown: Future work may narrow scan heuristics.
